channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ex-ESPN employee Jemele Hill 'disappointed' Dodgers visiting Trump at White House
item.description: Ex-ESPN employee Jemele Hill criticized the Los Angeles Dodgers for visiting President Trump at the White House to celebrate their 2024 World Series victory.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gunner Stockton strengthens hold on Georgia starting quarterback job with strong spring practice
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Carson Beck's decision to transfer to Miami opened the door for Gunner Stockton to take over as Georgia's starting quarterback.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mystery remains over cause of death of former NFL cornerback Vontae Davis
item.description: The cause of death for former NFL star cornerback Vontae Davis is still undetermined more than a year after he died at a Florida home.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luka and the Lakers believe they can win a championship after wrapping up the Pacific title
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — After the Los Angeles Lakers beat Houston on Friday night to clinch the Pacific Division title and the third seed in the playoffs with their 50th victory of the season, their postgame celebration was both wild and wet.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: With aid of early error, Bellarmine edges St. Ignatius in tight WCAL pitchers’ duel
item.description: Bellarmine baseball and St. Ignatius duked it out on Friday in San Jose, and the Bells came out on top thanks to some big at-bats in the second inning. Bellarmine, after an 0-5 start, has now won four WCAL games in a row.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Rory McIlroy catches fire, shoots 66 to get back into contention at the Masters
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Rory McIlroy’s fragile mental state got a big boost when he left Augusta National on Thursday night, shortly after a pair of late double bogeys had cast a pall on an otherwise brilliant round, in time to put his 4-year-old daughter, Poppy, to bed.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rory McIlroy, Bryson DeChambeau surge; Justin Rose holds slim Masters lead at midway point
item.description: We are in for an amazing finish at Augusta National this weekend after a second round that saw Rory McIlroy and Bryson Dechambeau climb the leaderboard.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Masters: When it starts, how to watch, betting odds for golf's first major of 2025
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Justin Rose remained atop a star-studded leaderboard after the second round of the Masters on Friday, with defending champion Scottie Scheffler, Rory McIlroy and Bryson DeChambeau all within three shots of the lead.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blackhawks host the Jets following Foligno's 2-goal game
item.description: Winnipeg Jets (54-21-4, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (23-46-10, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 7 p.m. EDT BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks host the Winnipeg Jets after Nick Foligno's two-goal game against the Boston Bruins in the Blackhawks' 5-2 win.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Real Salt Lake heads to the Music City to face Nashville SC
item.description: Fresh off a statement win over the defending MLS champion LA Galaxy, Real Salt Lake hits the road this Saturday to take on Nashville SC at GEODIS Park.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers look to keep home win streak going, host the Cubs
item.description: Chicago Cubs (9-6, first in the NL Central) vs. Los Angeles Dodgers (10-4, third in the NL West) Los Angeles; Friday, 10:10 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks score 4 3rd-period goals for 5-2 win over Bruins
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Nick Foligno scored a pair of goals, Arvid Soderblom made 31 saves and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Boston Bruins 5-2 on Thursday night. Ryan Donato, Tyler Bertuzzi and Kevin Korchinski also had goals for the Blackhawks, who scored four goals in third period to pull away.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls beat Heat behind Giddey's triple-double, move ahead of Miami for play-in home game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Bulls have just one game left at the United Center on their regular-season schedule. But they took a big step toward securing at least one more home game for the Eastern Conference play-in tournament.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: College athletes and San Diego students with disabilities team up for day of sports
item.description: The Inclusive Sports Foundation has provided children with special needs the opportunity to play sports with college athletes and recently stopped by the University of San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Julian Del Gaudio, Fox 5

item.title: Baseball: Canyon Hills 10, Southwest 7
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Great Monday to play some baseball with Southwest hosting Canyon Hills. Rattlers go on to win a score fest 10-7. The Rattlers scored six in the first and held on to win, despite Southwest cutting it down to 9-7 before tacking on one more run to win by three.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Nuggets fire head coach, GM with three games remaining before the playoffs
item.description: The decision comes as the Nuggets only have three regular-season games remaining before the NBA playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: Giants 2025 City Connect uniforms draw mixed reactions on social media
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants will debut their new City Connect uniforms Tuesday night when they welcome the Cincinnati Reds to Oracle Park. Ahead of the game, the team gave fans a preview of the uniforms in a post on X, formerly Twitter.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: After Masters week began with a day of rain on Monday, Augusta National Golf Club was bathed in sunshine for Tuesday's practice round.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, Fox 5

item.title: Egor Demin leaves BYU for NBA Draft
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU standout point guard Egor Demin has decided to leave BYU after one season and declare for the NBA Draft. Demin made the announcement at a press conference held at the school Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
